cassette: none: reducer.PostgresCICDRunCorrelationWriter operates over []CICDRunCorrelationDecision Go values, not a CanonicalMaterialization; the two fixture decisions live inline in go/internal/replay/costcounting/ci_cd_run_correlation_cost_test.go
description: Two exact-outcome CI/CD run decisions for distinct runs in one scope, driven through the production Postgres fact writer over an InstrumentedDB-wrapped counting fake. WriteCICDRunCorrelations writes every decision (no canonical filter) through the shared reducerBatchInsertFacts bounded chunked bulk insert (go/internal/reducer/reducer_fact_batch_insert.go, batch size 1000): two rows fit one chunk, so eshu_dp_postgres_query_duration_seconds records exactly 1 write observation and statements_executed=1. Any increase — an N+1 write-per-decision regression — trips the gate.
refresh_path: manual: edit the inline fixture decisions in ci_cd_run_correlation_cost_test.go and this file together, reviewed in the same diff (no credentialed cassette refresh applies since there is no cassette)
